prompt: Inform Esther that students will be on an educational trip for marine biology from May 1st to May 6th, and parents need to make their payments.
completion: Hello Esther, Students are attending an educational trip for a few days to the coastal region for their study in Marine biology from the 1st May to the 6th May, parents are required to make payment for the trip in due time to avoid any inconviences Frank (Headmaster).

prompt: Email Jim telling him I'm going to the clinic the coach teaches with Don K to work on my backstroke. Explain I want to watch a tournament this weekend but I don't know if I can between training and physical therapy.
completion: What's up, Jim? The coach said my backstroke needs a little work so I'm going to the clinic he teaches with Don K. It should be helpful moving forward. There's also a tournament I want to watch this weekend but I'm not sure if I'll have time between training and physical therapy. I'll keep you posted. --Walt

prompt: Tell Angel air travel scares me, and considered traveling by train but not the best option. Inform to meet at the mall at 7 pm.
completion: Dear Angel, Yes! Travellng by air scares the heck out of me, although for you, I would do anything. I also considered traveling by train but I did not consider that the best option. Meet me at the mall at 7pm. I will be there.  Cheers, Magdalena Fd

prompt: Email Coach Ferry introducing myself and my son, who is talented in table tennis and training on his own. Note he is doing the Chicago tournament and ask the coach to train him.
completion: Hey coach ferry, i'm madam maya and i was referred to you by a friend. My son is talented in table tennis and he has been training alone and since he has been choosen to participate at chicago tournament. I would kindly request you to caoch him.  Thanks.

prompt: Tell James I am visiting Germany and request he come with me. State I am staying in a 5-star hotel in Bayern that serves German and American dishes.
completion: Dear James,  I will be visiting Germany next month and I was requesting if you could take me as a friend. I have already booked a five star classy hotel in Bayern that serves a combination of both German and American dishes. Please make sure you accompany me for those holidays.  Hores.

prompt: Tell Jessica about our last week's match against the Red Devils and being impressed by beating them 1 to Nil even though we did have a few injured players.
completion: Hello Jessica? I hope you are well since the last week's match that we played against the Red Devils. I was impressed that we were able to beat them 1 to Nil amidst the gaping tie. I was actually happy despite the several injuries sustained by our players.  Roy.

prompt: Write an email to Mr. Redding to tell him about our cutting edge personal training and fitness programs.
completion: Hello Mr. Redding, Folowing your questions, I'd like to ensure you that our personal trainers develop training programs tailored to specific needs, from the target and the physical characteristics, first analyzed by specific tests using the most innovative equipment on the nowadays market today. Let us know if you are interested in our services Best Frances

prompt: Require that all participants in Friday's bake off will come to my office to sign the waiver.
completion: Team,  Anyone who is going to the bake off needs to sign the waiver no later than Friday or you will not be able to go. Our insurance requires that you do this so that you and our drivers are covered if an accident happens. I have the waivers or they are in the holder outside my door on floor 3 if I am not in the office,  Jane

prompt: Ask Pete to share the youth soccer league schedule, as my son is interested in joining.
completion: Dear Pete,  Are you the manager of the youth soccer league? I was wondering if you could send me the schedule of this year's games. My son is interested in joining, but I'd like to see the schedule first before we commit. Our family has some things on our calendar already, so I want to make sure we can make enough of the games.  Thank you! Preston

prompt: Send an email from Coach Sniggledoof to Mr. Markymoo to praise his son Jerrymoo for an excellent performance at soccer practice.
completion: Dear Mr. Markymoo,  Your son Jerrymoo did extremely well at the last practice session for socccer! His form is improving noticeably, and he should be very proud of himself and his work. I just wanted to send this email to cheer him on away from practice, as I think he has real potential, and I'm noticing him coming out of his shell more and more.  Glad to have him on the team,  Coach Sniggledoof

prompt: Send Dad an update about my travels and tell him that I'm on my way to the airport, but we haven't made plans for Florence yet beside seeing the Duomo.
completion: Hi dad, I just left my house to reach the airport. The plan for the next 3 days in Florence are not too sure yet, but we will go visit the Duomo for sure because Mary has never seen it, then wi will probably also visit the bridge because it's great. I'll send you pics. Love you,  Martha

prompt: Message Jughead about the new "Honest Thief" movie and tell him that I think he should see it.
completion: Hi Jughead,  I just saw the new movie "Honest Thief" with Liam Neeson and I think you'll love it! It's a typical Neeson movie- someone hurts his loved one and he gets vicious revenge. It's action packed and an overall great movie. I highly recommend that you watch it this weekend! Let me know what you think about it.   Enjoy!   Carmen

prompt: Contact Jimmy to suggest he check out our New Years deals at Smart Gaming & Entertainment.
completion: Hello Jimmy, Happy 2019! I’m glad that we made it this far. All our gaming services are now back after the holiday break. Here at Smart Gaming & and entertainment we’re throwing discounts on our gaming packages to help you get the year started. Visit our stores or online website and get your gaming equipment at attractive discounts. Sincerely, Josh.

prompt: Inquire about why singles rooms are nearly as expensive as doubles rooms.
completion: Hi,  When I check your website I see that the singles rooms are almost as expensive as the double rooms, how come? They are smaller and there's less washing to do, so could you please explain why I should pay so much more for my stay than my friends who are sharing a double?   Best regards,   Richard Thomlinson

prompt: Tell Tatianna how she acted when she got drunk at the club yesterday. Describe how she grabbed the microphone from the singer and sang a beautiful song that everyone loved. Hope for her safety.
completion: Hi Tatianna,  You got so drunk at the club yesterday. You snatched the microphone from the singer and started singer one of the most beautiful songs I've ever heard. Everyone was so amazed. I never knew you had the ability to sing like that when you are intoxicated. Anyway, hope you are safe at home. Stay away from alcohol though.  From Michelle.

prompt: Ask if Mick got tickets for the Grouch of Monte Frisco on Sat. at 3 pm my wife requested and forward the email to my wife's email: s_374h@tmail.com
completion: Hey Mick,  Did you get the tickets for the Saturday afternoon 3:00 matinee performance of The Grouch of Monte Frisco like my wife requested? Please forward the confirmation email with ticket details to my wife's email account: s_374h@tmail.com.   Thanks.  Sam

prompt: Tell cousin Kenny Uncle Bart got us tickets to the Biggie Bowl. Inform him to prepare his spaghetti and pack for the weekend since we will be bunking with Uncle Bart and Aunt Emma.
completion: Cousin Kenny,   Have a seat, I have excellent news! Uncle Bart got us tickets to the Biggie Bowl!! Really, I'm not pulling your leg. So, get your spaghetti ready for the most colossal event of the year! Pack for the entire weekend because we'll be bunking with Uncle Bart and Aunt Emma for this unbelievable stroke of good luck.  Can't wait to see you, Cousin Pete

prompt: Inform Thomas that our cinema card isn't working and so we will need to use his to watch movies tomorrow. Remind him it is a double date and to bring his girlfriend.
completion: Dear Thomas,  It seems like my cinema card is not working anymore for some reason. We would have to use yours to be able to watch the movies tomorrow. I'll need to get a new one. Remember it will be a double date, so bring your girlfriend along, mine is coming as well. I don't want you to be feeling awkward by yourself.  Looking forward to it,  Joshua

prompt: Inform that I know they are going to the Maldives and request they fill a small bottle of sand from there so I can add it to my collection.
completion: Hey you! I heard you are going to the Maldivas next week and I couldn't be more jealous. I just wanted to ask you for something, and it might sound weird but... I have this thing in my house where I place tiny bottles with sand from different places, could you do me the favour of filling the bottle I left you on the desk with some sand from those beaches? Thank you, Sara

prompt: Tell Susan that Bobby is on the local AYSO soccer team, and it takes precedence over their event.
completion: Hi Susan.  My little Bobby is on the local AYSO soccer team, so I think he's needs are going to have to take precedent over your little....event. I don't doubt it is important to you, but the team is important to my Bobby and that's where we'll be focussing our time.  Glinda (Bobby's mommy)

prompt: Tell the members about the meeting on the 26th of this month and how we will discuss the financial progress and budget for next year.
completion: Dear members,  Our club's general meeting will be held on 26th of this month. The main agenda for the meeting will be to discuss the financial progress of the year together with the budget for next year. Arrive on time and all the best on your next match.  Thank you,  Folax (Club's coach)

prompt: Tell John since I know he wants to go to Jamaica, Costco is offering packages there. Inform that  he can call about the perks at  1-877-888-3333 and I don't get commission.
completion: John,  I know you have been talking about going to Jamaica and I wonder if you know that Costco is offering vacation packages to Jamaica.  If you want more information on their packages and the perks you get for being a member, call 1-877-888-3333.  I know you can find what you have been looking for with them.   And, no, I don't get a commission.  LOL   Just try it,  Stewie

prompt: Ask Valentina her plan for Valentine's Day and suggest Wings to Fly Travel Limited that have the best destinations with discounts and travel rates.
completion: Hello Valentina, What is your get away plan for the upcoming Valentine’s Day? Wings to Fly Travel Limited have some of the best travel destinations you have ever imagined. We understand that the economy is not doing well, and that’s why we’re giving discounts on travel rates. Let us know the special destiny you want to travel with your sweetheart. Many thanks, Devin

prompt: Email everyone the banquet begins at 9:30 pm. Inform there are 3 speakers before the special guest and a meet and greet afterward where a formal announcement is made.
completion: Hi all,  The banquet will begin at 9:30 PM so please be sure to arrive in time to park and get situated. There will be three speakers before our special guest addresses the audience. There will be a meet-and-greet following our special guest's address and we ask everyone to remain seated until a formal announcement is made. Any questions can be asked by replying to this email. Thanks and have a wonderful evening!  Sincerely, Marsha

prompt: Message Jughead about the new "Honest Thief" movie and tell him that I think he should see it.
completion: Hi Jughead,  I just saw the new movie "Honest Thief" with Liam Neeson and I think you'll love it! It's a typical Neeson movie- someone hurts his loved one and he gets vicious revenge. It's action packed and an overall great movie. I highly recommend that you watch it this weekend! Let me know what you think about it.   Enjoy!   Carmen
